name: editorialist
description: Import structured editorial feedback from human editors, beta readers, or AI, then review every suggested edit scene by scene.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run css-check && npm run css-audit && npm run qa-audit && npm run compliance && node esbuild.config.mjs production && npm run copy:dev && node scripts/backup-if-stale.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run css-check && npm run css-audit && npm run qa-audit && npm run compliance
scripts.check:ci: npm run lint:obsidian && npm run lint:obsidian:report && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run css-check && npm run css-audit && npm run qa-audit && npm run compliance && npm run test && npm run css-drift -- --maintenance && npm run build-only
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run test && npm run css-drift -- --maintenance && npm run build
scripts.backup: npm run test && npm run css-drift -- --maintenance && npm run build && node scripts/backup.mjs
scripts.audit:codebase:
node -e "console.log('Weekly Codebase Health Audit
  Prompt: docs/engineering/audits/prompts/weekly-codebase-health-audit.md
  Template: docs/engineering/audits/templates/codebase-health-report.md
  Save report to: docs/engineering/audits/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-codebase-health.md

This script does not run the audit automatically — paste the prompt into an IDE agent at the repo root.')"
scripts.audit:architecture:
node -e "console.log('Weekly Architecture Drift Audit
  Prompt: docs/engineering/audits/prompts/weekly-architecture-drift-audit.md
  Template: docs/engineering/audits/templates/architecture-drift-report.md
  Save report to: docs/engineering/audits/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-architecture-drift.md

This script does not run the audit automatically — paste the prompt into an IDE agent at the repo root.')"
scripts.audit:obsidian:
node -e "console.log('Biweekly Obsidian Ecosystem Audit
  Prompt: docs/engineering/audits/prompts/biweekly-obsidian-ecosystem-audit.md
  Template: docs/engineering/audits/templates/obsidian-ecosystem-report.md
  Save report to: docs/engineering/audits/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-obsidian-ecosystem.md

This script does not run the audit automatically — paste the prompt into an IDE agent at the repo root.')"
scripts.audit:refactor-board:
node -e "console.log('Monthly Refactor Recommendation Board
  Prompt: docs/engineering/audits/prompts/monthly-refactor-board.md
  Template: docs/engineering/audits/templates/refactor-board-report.md
  Save report to: docs/engineering/audits/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-refactor-board.md

This script does not run the board automatically — paste the prompt into an IDE agent at the repo root. The agent will synthesize the prior month of reports under docs/engineering/audits/reports/.')"
